scores.note: All 6 rubric criteria met. 60s structure perfect (4+12+12+22+5+5). Hook establishes pain without logo. Clear CTA with URL. Warning on Scene 4 density noted but not a failure.
Perfect execution. 6 scenes, hook in 3s, CTA overlay correct, 30s total exact (3+5+5+10+3+4). All captions and visuals specified. No warnings.

Identifies BOFU/MOFU mismatch. Finds 7 trust gaps (testimonials, specificity, authority, security, guarantee, founder, recency) with evidence. 7-item fix list prioritized by impact × effort. No fabrication.
Identifies TOFU/BOFU mismatch on $49 ask. Finds 6+ trust gaps. 7-item fix list distinguishes quick-win copy changes from structural layout changes. All actionable.

LCP root cause: missing preload (not CDN). CLS: font swap + unsized ad (two sources). INP: hydration cost, not layout thrash. Fix list prioritized by score impact. All specific (file paths, HTML/CSS changes, expected deltas).

LCP text node — explains SSR/prerendering requirement correctly. Identifies render-blocking scripts and @import font loading. Distinguishes hydration from layout thrash. Comprehensive bundle-split strategy. Perfect diagnosis.

NO-GO verdict correct. Catches: broken /prcing link, 3 missing alt attributes, .env credentials marked CRITICAL (non-negotiable), contact form error. Does not soften severity. Minor: meta title/description check incomplete.

NO-GO verdict correct. Catches: tap target a11y violation (28×28px), placeholder text '[INSERT BENEFITS HERE]', old brand name in email (Halo Goods), SSL padlock missing. All clean items (sitemap, GA, meta) noted. Perfect.

Structured template with labeled sections. Correctly forces clarification on 5 unknowns (product, audience, goal, deadline, budget). Extracts: mobile required, clean aesthetic. Does not fabricate. Brief intentionally incomplete — correct per rubric.

Structured template complete. Extracts 5 core facts: goal (reactivation 90+d), audience (lapsed customers), budget ($40k), legal constraint (discount review), deadline (Aug 15). Forces 2 correct open questions (KPI definition, discount offer contingency). No fabrication.

Captures: moved to /api/v2/auth for org-scoped claims, JWT chosen over DB sessions, token refresh blocking Q for CLI, legacy path risk flagged. Files: src/lib/auth.ts, src/app/api/v2/auth/route.ts, middleware.ts. Paste-ready. Captures ~90% of context.

Perfect capture: root cause (Suspense resolving late), fix applied and scope (desktop CLS 0.31→0.04), mobile issue (hardcoded px vs dynamic), open Q with two options, design sign-off required. Files flagged. Paste-ready. ~95% context.

Finds SQL injection (CWE-89, CRITICAL): f-string cursor.execute. Finds SSTI (CWE-94, CRITICAL): render_template_string with f-string template. Finds input validation missing (CWE-20, MEDIUM). No false positives.

Finds: hardcoded weak secret 'mysecret123' (CWE-798, CRITICAL), hardcoded admin/admin (CWE-798, CRITICAL), unhandled jwt.verify exception (CWE-755, HIGH), no JWT expiry (CWE-613, MEDIUM). All correct severity.

Extracts 8 tasks: niche decision, platform selection, 3 issues, landing page, 90-day growth plan, monetization roadmap. Classifies by type (decisions, actions, outputs). Dependencies noted (T2 depends on T1). No hallucination.

Extracts 6 tasks: diagnosis, redesign UX, rewrite email, freemium decision, delivery plan, measure. Classifies (research, action, decision). Dependencies clear (T2/T3/T4 depend on T1). No hallucination.
6 scenes, hook establishes EM pain in 5s (Slack/Jira chaos), CTA 'Book demo' in final scene, 60s exact (5+12+10+20+8+5), captions per scene detailed. All rubric criteria met.

6 scenes, hook with match wick in 5s, CTA 'Shop embercandles.co' in final scene, 90s total (5+12+12+25+12+24), captions/text overlays per scene detailed. Note on Scene 6 length justified for DTC. All criteria met.

aggregate.regressions_vs_first_run: No baseline first run available; this is the first full evaluation.
